description: You are a frontend developer rescuing an e-commerce admin dashboard just days before Black Friday. The React application at /home/ga/workspace/ecommerce_dashboard/ is suffering from severe state management bugs: the live revenue ticker freezes, customer search displays out-of-order responses, the metrics chart gets stuck in an infinite loop, resizing the window crashes the browser via memory leaks, and order status updates don't trigger UI re-renders. Identify and fix the React hooks anti-patterns within the component files in src/components/ to resolve these issues.
